Tournament Star Plate Mail

Once in a while, the unit's physical armor and max health increase by 35% for 4 sec and during this time, the unit blocks 70% of incoming magic damage.
Also during this time, each second, the unit deals pure damage to a random enemy (preferred target: mage) equal to 40% of the damage blocked by the ability. Also, the unit restores health equal to 100% of the damage dealt by the ability.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

First trigger: 4 sec

Cooldown: 7 secs
